single_points_of_failure: Chainlink oracle dependency for price feeds across all deployments
Chainlink CCIP bridge dependency for cross-chain GHO transfers
centralization_risks: Governance token concentration among large holders
Proxy upgradeability via governance — contracts are not immutable
Cross-chain governance propagation from Ethereum to L2 deployments
rationale: AAVE is DeFi's most battle-tested lending protocol (live since 2020, $10B+ TVL). 8 audits from 7 top-tier firms (Trail of Bits, OpenZeppelin, SigmaPrime, Certora x2, Peckshield, Sherlock, Oxorio) with zero high/medium findings — only 3 low-severity. One moderate incident: $1.6M bad debt from CRV market manipulation (Nov 2022), since remediated via governance. $1M Immunefi bug bounty, proxy_timelock with 24hr delay and 5-of-9 multisig. Medium-risk dependencies on Chainlink (oracle + CCIP bridge) and historical Curve exposure. Low dev velocity (0.96 weekly commits) reflects protocol maturity. Tier 4: exceptional audit record with one moderate blemish.
